zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Piers於1430年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特福洛時，她的父親John Piers Of Montague30歲，母親Elizabeth De Montfort25歲。她於1447年與William Butler x-xh在英國格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Pierce  .

variants.name: Pierce
meanings: English, Welsh, and Irish: from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Piers, Peres, Peris, an Old French nominative of Pierre or Per, the French form of Peter . Pierce is especially frequent in northwestern Wales and Lancashire, while Pearce is the more common spelling in the rest of England. In Ireland Pierce and Pearse represent a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Piarais ‘son of Piaras’, a Gaelicized form of Piers.
Americanized form of some similar-sounding Jewish surname.
History: Franklin Pierce (1804–69), 14th president of the US, was born in Hillsborough, NH, on the New England frontier. His English ancestor Thomas Pierce emigrated to Charlestown, MA, in 1633/34.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Piers was born in 1430, in Frome, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Piers Of Montague, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth De Montfort, was 25. She married William Butler x-xh in 1447, in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1500, in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

Elle a épousé William Butler x-xh en 1447, à Badminton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Badminton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Piers(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 프롬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Piers Of Montague(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth De Montfort(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1447년 영국 그루스스터실르 바드민턴에서 William Butler x-xh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 바드민턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
